vehicle.label: Force-Feedback Haptic Glove Pair

requirements: Subsystem module: Dorsal Control Module x 2
Snap-in dorsal electronics and battery module

verify.rule: mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value
Motor power lines and sensor/encoder signal lines run in separate channels or are spaced/crossed at right angles
Each electronics module states its grounding scheme and signal returns route alongside their signals
PCBs mount on standoffs with keep-out clearance to walls and moving parts, connector edges face access openings
Adjacent interfaces are named with exact neighboring subsystem labels and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature
Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance around connector edges may lead to interference with moving parts.
risk.mit: Increase clearance around connector edges to ensure no interference with moving parts.

risk.desc: Potential for thermal issues if heat sink is not properly aligned with controller board.
risk.mit: Ensure heat sink is properly aligned with controller board and thermal paste is applied during assembly.

risk.desc: Service label and cable exit may be difficult to access if not properly positioned.
risk.mit: Position service label and cable exit in an easily accessible location on the dorsal control module.

risk.desc: Snap tabs may not provide sufficient retention if not properly designed.
risk.mit: Ensure snap tabs are designed with sufficient retention force and are tested during prototype phase.

risk.desc: Tool-less lid may not provide adequate protection if not properly sealed.
risk.mit: Ensure tool-less lid is properly sealed and tested for water and dust ingress resistance.

integration_opportunities.details: Ensure snap fit is last to avoid damage
